variations.caption: Sleep cooler, wake sharper lah. The Pod tunes each side of your bed to your perfect temperature — now in Singapore. Try it risk-free for 30 nights.

captionsByLocale.en-SG: Sleep cooler, wake sharper lah. The Pod tunes each side of your bed to your perfect temperature — now in Singapore. Try it risk-free for 30 nights.
captionsByLocale.zh-Hans-SG: 睡得更凉，醒得更清。Pod 能为床的两边各自调温，现已登陆新加坡。30 晚无忧试睡，不爱可退。
captionsByLocale.ms-SG: Tidur lebih sejuk, bangun lebih segar. Pod laraskan suhu setiap sisi katil anda — kini di Singapura. Cuba 30 malam tanpa risiko.
captionsByLocale.ta-SG: குளிர்ச்சியாய் தூங்குங்கள், தெளிவாய் எழுந்திருங்கள். Pod உங்கள் படுக்கையின் இரு பக்கங்களையும் தனித்தனியாக சீராக்கும் — இப்போது சிங்கப்பூரில். 30 இரவு இலவச சோதனை.

variations.moodNote: Cinematic teal bedside calm, cool minimalist recovery sanctuary

content.en-SG: The Pod tunes each side to your perfect temperature. 30-night risk-free trial.
content.zh-Hans-SG: The Pod 为床的两侧调控理想温度。30 晚无风险试睡。
content.ms-SG: The Pod menala setiap sisi katil ke suhu sempurna anda. Cuba 30 malam tanpa risiko.
content.ta-SG: The Pod உங்கள் படுக்கையின் இரு பக்கங்களையும் சரியான வெப்பநிலைக்கு அமைக்கிறது. 30 இரவுகள் இலவச சோதனை.

input.prompt:
Eight Sleep | Now in Singapore — Fall asleep faster and stay asleep longer with personalized cooling and heating for each side of the bed. The Pod reduces snoring, tracks your sleep, and works with any mattress. Try it risk-free for 30 nights.
Hero subject: Eight Sleep | Now in Singapore — Fall asleep faster and stay asleep longer with personalized cooling and heating for each side of the bed. The Pod reduces snoring, tracks your sleep, and works with any mattress. Try it risk-free for 30 nights. — featuring air purifier (compact bedside air purifier with rounded top, fabric-wrapped lower body, and a circular vent/handle cutout) — brand: B logo (reference vibe: Eight Sleep | Now in Singapore).
Mood: cinematic.
Compose this image so it remains readable when cropped to any of these aspect ratios: 1:1, 4:5, 9:16, 16:9. The hero subject must stay centered and uncropped in every one.
Reserve the following regions as soft negative space — flat tone, low detail, no clutter — so editable text overlays can be placed there separately:
- the upper-center region (90% × 18%) for the headline.
- the lower-center region (90% × 17%) for the caption.
Primary subject anchor: the central 64% × 64% region of the frame; this region must survive every crop.
Do not render any text, logos, or watermarks in the image; all copy will be added as a separate editable overlay.

plan.rewrittenPrompt: Cinematic bedside scene: a compact air purifier with rounded top, fabric-wrapped lower body and circular vent cutout, centered on a minimalist nightstand beside a softly lit bed. Moody blue-teal tones, gentle rim light, shallow depth of field. Clean flat empty space at top and bottom of frame, low detail, no text, no logos.
plan.rationale: Square base composition with strong centered hero and reserved top/bottom negative space ensures safe cropping to 4:5, 9:16, and 16:9.
